title: Spec / stack
description: Tech stack decision for the project. May be "proposed" by intake and tightened to "locked" by the architect agent in Phase 1.

track.description: Stack track from stack-catalog.yaml. Adding a new value requires updating both this enum and the catalog.

track_chosen_by.description: Who chose the track. "intake" = Claude Desktop intake; "architect" = architect-technical agent in Phase 1; "operator" = manual override.

track_rationale.description: Why this track over alternatives. Saved verbatim into artifacts/architecture/technical-plan.md.

lock_status.description: Lifecycle of the stack choice. Factory only enters Phase 3 when locked.

cms.description: CMS provider. Must be consistent with track (e.g. astro-sanity → sanity).

auth.description: Auth provider when scope.auth_required is true.

aliases.description: Hostnames that should redirect or also resolve (e.g. "www.acme.cz").

registrar.description: Where the domain is registered. Useful when DNS handover is part of the project.

dns_managed_by_us.description: If true, the project is allowed to make DNS changes; if false, the client controls DNS.

third_party_keys_required.description: Names of API keys / tokens the project needs (e.g. "sanity_write_token", "plausible_api_key"). Stored in ~/.config/factory/secrets.env, never in the spec.
